title: Bearsh
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Bearsh |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], [[The Redoubt/Legends|The Redoubt]] |species=[[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]]''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=Violet |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Vagaari Empire]]''[[The Unknown Regions]]'' **[[Geroon Remnant]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Ah, yes. ''[…]'' As was the beginning, so is the end. ''[…]''''"
"''What?''"
"''As was the beginning, so is the end. ''[…]'' Once, victims. ''[…]'' Now, victors.|General Bearsh unveils his fraud|}} '''Bearsh''' was the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] [[General/Legends|General]] during the [[Battle of the Redoubt]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. ==Biography== Bearsh masqueraded as a [[Geroon (species)|Geroon]] along with several other Vagaari, tricking a Chiss [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|company]] led by [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]] that included the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]. They tricked the others into believing they were [[Geroon (species)|Geroons]], a race that had been enslaved by the Vagaari Empire at the time of [[Outbound Flight]]'s arrival in [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss space]] nearly five decades earlier. The Chiss, whom they called their savior, allowed them to travel to the remains of Outbound Flight in the [[Redoubt]]. Once there, Bearsh and his companions revealed their true roots, and attacked, seeking revenge against the Chiss who had nearly wiped out the Vagaari in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]] (though in fact [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], acting as a rogue had battled them). Along with the help of the survivors of the crashed spacecraft, the Jedi defeated the Vagaari, despite the fact that nearly 300 Vagaari warriors were there. Even Bearsh's [[wolvkil]]s were no match for the Jedi, and the [[General/Legends|General]] was killed. Not long afterward, the remaining Vagaari who had fled in one of Outbound Flight's [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|dreadnaughts]] were captured by the Chiss, thanks to Luke and Mara Jade. ==Appearances== *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Bearsh }} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Vagaari]]
